examples: This type will be used later to dispatch polymorphic behavior.
Probing of overloaded and polymorphic functions is not supported.
While Live OneCare did manage to spot 100% of the macro viruses it was tested against, it missed some wild viruses, polymorphic programs and file infectors.
Even worse, it appears that BadNews is polymorphic, that is, it changes its own code structure depending on its deployment parameters making it considerably harder to detect and remove.
